code:
import io
import string

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = x % y
    x = y
    y = t
  end
  x
end

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums = [0, 0]
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          if count < 2
            nums = [if count == 0 cur else nums[0] end, if count == 1 cur else nums[1] end]
            count = count + 1
          end
          cur = 0
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      in_num = in_num
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if count < 2
      nums = [if count == 0 cur else nums[0] end, if count == 1 cur else nums[1] end]
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  let a = nums[0]
  let b = nums[1]
  let g = gcd(a, b)
  print("gcd=#{g}")
  Ok(())
end
